title: Anti-Hallucination Specification Pattern: Universal pattern for preventing AI in
rationale: AI agents hallucinate implementation details when specifications are vague. This pattern eliminates drift by requiring explicit specification of everything.
description: Anti-Hallucination Specification Pattern: Universal pattern for preventing AI interpretation drift. 7 required elements: exact file paths, exact function signatures, exact error behaviors, exact field lists, exact step order, validation questions, forbidden phrases. 4-layer validation framework: spec checksums, implementation tests, compliance report, cross-agent validation.
decision_reason: Category: other. Impact: 10/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
